\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\(\pi\)-ladder parameterization} Define the discrete ladder \begin{equation} \kappa_k = k\pi,\qquad k\in\Z_{>0}. \label{eq:pi_ladder} \end{equation} This partitions forcing into regimes where no single \(J_n(\kappa)^2\)
